description_long: This sculpture depicts a tightly grouped cluster of six life-sized human figures, each rendered in a rough, textured style that emphasizes the folds of their clothing and the somber expressions on their faces. The figures appear to be walking together, with some looking downward and others gazing ahead, evoking a sense of solemnity and shared experience. The clothing details suggest mid-20th-century attire, with long coats, dresses, and head coverings. The surface has a metallic, bluish-gray patina, giving the sculpture a cold, monolithic appearance. The figures are closely spaced, with overlapping limbs and bodies, creating a unified, almost inseparable group. The overall form is solid and heavy, with no visible base or pedestal in the images.
description: A life-sized, textured metal sculpture of six somber human figures walking closely together, rendered in a bluish-gray patina. The group is unified and evokes a sense of solemnity and shared experience.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces and forward movement of all six figures, with detailed expressions and overlapping bodies.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figures, the depth of the group, and the layered arrangement of their clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, the folds of their coats, and the close proximity of the group.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profiles and the staggered positioning of the figures, emphasizing their collective movement.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures walking together
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
